double-room.title: Double Room
double-room.description: This air-conditioned double room has a flat-screen TV with cable channels and a private bathroom. Ideal for couples and short city stays.

double-twin-room.title: Double/Twin Room
double-twin-room.bed: 1 large double bed or 2 single beds
double-twin-room.description: Designed for couples and business trips, this air-conditioned room offers flexible bedding, private bathroom, and a flat-screen TV.

prm-room.title: Double Room - PRM Access
prm-room.description: Located on the ground floor, this spacious and fully wheelchair-accessible double room features hardwood floors, a private bathroom adapted for PRM access, and modern amenities for a comfortable, barrier-free stay.
facilities: Entire unit located on ground floor

triple-room.title: Triple Room
triple-room.description: Spacious and practical for families or small groups with quality bedding, private bathroom, flat-screen TV, and modern in-room comfort.
